source_name: European Banking Authority
title: ESAs publish the first report on DORA major ICT-related incidents
clean_title: ESAs publish the first report on DORA major ICT-related incidents
summary: The European Supervisory Authorities (EBA, EIOPA and ESMA) today published their first annual overview of major ICT-related incidents in the EU financial sector based on a reporting mechanism established by the Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA). It shows that ICT risks are increasingly borderless and interconnected. The authorities also note that the recent evolution of highly capable AI-driven tools should encourage financial entities to strengthen cybersecurity measures to maintain their resilience going forward.
why_selected: Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact risques/cyber.
impacts: Peut modifier l’exposition opérationnelle, fraude ou cyber des établissements.
title_signature: dora esas first ict incidents major publish related report
normalized_title: esas publish the first report on dora major ict related incidents

source_name: European Banking Authority
title: ​The EBA and the New York State Department of Financial Services sign a Memorandum of Understanding to foster cooperation in the supervision of international stablecoin activities
clean_title: ​The EBA and the New York State Department of Financial Services sign a Memorandum of Understanding to foster cooperation in the supervision of international stablecoin activities
summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) under the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA). The agreement aims to strengthen cooperation in the supervision of entities engaged in cross-border stablecoin activities.
why_selected: Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.
impacts: Peut modifier la conformité, les reportings ou la gouvernance des acteurs financiers.
title_signature: activities cooperation department eba foster international memorandum new services sign
normalized_title: the eba and the new york state department of financial services sign a memorandum of understanding to foster cooperation in the supervision of international stablecoin activities
